display-1.purpose: Hero statements and the final CTA. One per section, at most.

lead.purpose: Introductory paragraphs following a Display heading. Capped at 48–55ch.

body.purpose: Pillar / column / accordion prose. Capped at 65ch.

label.purpose: Eyebrows ([001] CASHU PROTOCOL), pill-tag chips, version stamps. Mono is structural, not decorative.

shadows.name: phone-drop
shadows.purpose: Reserved for the Phone Placeholder component only. Depicts a physical device sitting on a surface. Never reused on UI primitives.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default ease-out-quart for hover, navbar blur, accordion icon rotation.

components.name: Primary CTA Pill
components.description: Inverse-surface fill, pill-shaped. Used at most once per section as the primary action.
components.css: .ds-pill-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; background: #fafafa; color: #0a0a0a; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Satoshi', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-pill-cta:hover { background: #b4a7f5; color: #0a0a0a; } .ds-pill-cta:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #b4a7f5; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Outline Pill
components.description: Secondary action adjacent to CTA. Hairline border, transparent fill.
components.css: .ds-pill-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; background: transparent; color: #fafafa; border: 1px solid rgba(250, 250, 250, 0.3); border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Satoshi', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-pill-outline:hover { border-color: #fafafa; }

components.name: Tag Pill
components.description: Static label chip. Mono type. Used to enumerate audience archetypes in feature columns. Never clickable.
components.css: .ds-pill-tag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; background: transparent; color: rgba(250, 250, 250, 0.8); border: 1px solid #1f1f22; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0; }

components.name: Index Mark
components.description: Bracketed numeric marker in JetBrains Mono. Sits in section eyebrows and floats at the top-right of feature columns. Rendered in Cashu Lilac.
components.css: .ds-index-mark { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 2.25rem; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: #b4a7f5; line-height: 1; }

components.name: Accordion Item
components.description: Native <details> built on hairline rules. The icon rotates from + to − on open; no animated height.
components.html:
Bearer instrument
Cashu tokens are unforgeable digital objects. Whoever holds them owns them. No accounts, no server-side balances, no claim on someone else’s books.
components.css: .ds-accordion { border-top: 1px solid #e5e5e5; padding: 1.5rem 0; color: #0a0a0a; font-family: 'Satoshi', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-accordion summary { list-style: none; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1.5rem; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.015em; } .ds-accordion summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; } .ds-accordion-icon { position: relative; width: 1rem; height: 1rem; flex-shrink: 0; color: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.7); } .ds-accordion-h { position: absolute; left: 0; top: 50%; width: 1rem; height: 1px; background: currentColor; transform: translateY(-50%); } .ds-accordion-v { position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 0; width: 1px; height: 1rem; background: currentColor; transform: translateX(-50%); transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-accordion[open] .ds-accordion-v { transform: translateX(-50%) rotate(90deg) scaleY(0); } .ds-accordion-body { padding-top: 1rem; max-width: 65ch; color: #6b6b73; line-height: 1.55; }

components.name: Phone Placeholder
components.description: Signature component. Mimics a phone bezel and screen with a dynamic-island notch. Locked at 9:19.5 aspect ratio. The only place a drop shadow appears in the system.
components.html: Balance
components.css: .ds-phone { position: relative; width: 200px; aspect-ratio: 9 / 19.5; } .ds-phone-bezel { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: #0f0f12; border: 1px solid #222226; border-radius: 2.25rem; box-shadow: 0 30px 60px -20px rgba(0,0,0,0.4); } .ds-phone-screen { position: absolute; inset: 6px; border-radius: 1.85rem; background: #0a0a0a; overflow: hidden; } .ds-phone-hatch { position: absolute; inset: 0; opacity: 0.6; color: #222226; background-image: repeating-linear-gradient(45deg, transparent 0 14px, currentColor 14px 15px); } .ds-phone-notch { position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 8px; transform: translateX(-50%); height: 20px; width: 80px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.8); border-radius: 9999px; } .ds-phone-label { position: absolute; left: 50%; bottom: 24px; transform: translateX(-50%); font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #8a8a93; background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; }

narrative.overview: cashu.me is a specimen page for a piece of digital cash. Type is the artifact. The page reads like a museum caption: dispassionate, precise, large, asking the viewer to look without selling them anything. Sections alternate between a black inkwell and a white specimen cream, the way a printed monograph alternates between facing plates and explanatory text. The aesthetic is editorial and committed, not enterprise. Restraint is the voice. The page rejects every dominant crypto-site reflex: it is not neon, not glassmorphic, not chart-heavy, not pastel, not navy-and-gold.
keyCharacteristics: Editorial scale (hero up to ~10rem at large viewports), tight tracking (-0.035em), short leading (0.94).
Section-scoped dark/light theming via [data-theme] — themes alternate, not chosen.
Lilac accent used sparingly: [N] marks, CTA hover, ::selection. Never large fields.
Native <details> accordion, native <a> pill buttons. No bespoke widgets where the platform suffices.
Phone placeholders maintain device proportions (9:19.5); no skeuomorphic chrome.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Cashu Lilac is the sole chromatic note in the system. It appears on no more than ~5% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Black, No-Pure-White Rule
rules.body: Every surface tints toward the brand hue at chroma 0.005–0.01. Pure #0a0a0a and #ffffff are temporary.

rules.name: The Specimen Scale Rule
rules.body: The hero owns Display 1. No other element on the page reaches that size. Hierarchy is enforced by giving the apex one place to live.

rules.name: The Balanced Wrap Rule
rules.body: All headings carry text-wrap: balance. All long-form prose carries text-wrap: pretty.

rules.name: The Mono-as-Structure Rule
rules.body: Mono is structural, not decorative. It appears on [N] marks, pill tags, eyebrow labels, and the version stamp. Decorative mono is costume.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Buttons, cards, inputs, sections, and chips are flat at rest. Shadows are reserved for objects depicting physical things (phones).

dos: Do keep Cashu Lilac at ≤5% of any screen.
Do invert surfaces between sections (dark → light → dark) like a printed monograph.
Do carry [N] index marks in JetBrains Mono on every section that enumerates.
Do use native <details> for accordions, <a> for buttons, <section data-theme> for theme scope.
Do cap body lines at 65ch and lead lines at 48–55ch.
Do use text-wrap: balance on headings and text-wrap: pretty on prose.
Do keep the navbar at 64px and adapt its theme via IntersectionObserver.
donts: Don't use neon-on-black crypto colors. No electric neon, no 3D logos, no futurist UI.
Don't use consumer-fintech pastels, friendly mascots, or gradient illustrations à la Cash App / Venmo / Revolut.
Don't lean on bank navy + gold institutional gravitas.
Don't use Web3 / DeFi maximalism: glassmorphism, rainbow accents, chart-driven heros.
Don't use card grids with icon + heading + subtitle templates.
Don't use em dashes in user-facing copy. Use commas, colons, semicolons, periods, or parentheses.
Don't use background-clip: text gradient text, decorative glassmorphism, or border-left side stripes.
Don't use Cashu Lilac (#b4a7f5) for text on white. Switch to Cashu Lilac Deep (#7a66e8).
Don't apply ambient shadows to flat surfaces.
Don't ship a heading without text-wrap: balance or prose without text-wrap: pretty.
